name: ilp_grouped_loads
description: Load N values simultaneously into registers for instruction-level parallelism in memory-bound kernels with strided access. 8-wide is the sweet spot on B200: enough in-flight requests to saturate HBM, without killing occupancy via register pressure. Use __launch_bounds__ to control occupancy tradeoff.
when_to_apply: Memory-bound kernels with strided access patterns (e.g., reducing over channels in NCHW layout where each channel is far apart in memory). Also useful for any reduction where the stride is >>128 bytes.
